response.justification: Rodriguez brings exceptional technical depth with 15+ years of production experience and demonstrated ability to architect scalable systems, as evidenced by high-performance microservices work at Dunnhumby and infrastructure contributions at Optilyz. However, the resume shows no direct experimentation platform, A/B testing framework, metrics instrumentation, or measurement system experience—critical domain requirements for a Principal-level Growth/Experimentation Systems role. While core engineering fundamentals are strong enough to support domain learning, this gap is substantial for a Principal IC6 position expected to lead growth strategy and experimentation architecture.
strengths: 15+ years of production engineering with clear progression to staff-level roles, demonstrating ability to own complex technical decisions across multiple domains
Strong track record designing systemic solutions and reusable infrastructure: GISCollective platform, testing frameworks, and microservices handling millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby
Recent work in AI infrastructure and agent tooling at re:cinq shows adaptability to emerging technologies and willingness to engage with modern tooling
concerns: No demonstrated experience building or owning experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature-flagging systems, or rollout infrastructure—the core charter of this role
Lacks measurable metrics, telemetry, or data analysis expertise; no evidence of collaboration with data science teams on statistical analysis or bias detection

Career trajectory shows strong individual contributor across varied domains rather than specialized technical leadership in growth/experimentation; limited visible cross-team influence at Principal scale

key_factors.factor: Distributed systems and production architecture capability
Data aptitude and telemetry infrastructure depth
